pr.title: [Non-Record] Hymba-8L: Hybrid SSM + Sliding Window Attention with 32K Context (1.1470 BPB)

output.summary: Hymba-8L pairs Mamba SSM with sliding-window attention to train 32K-context models within 10 minutes while tuning depth, regularization, quant, and TTT.
techniques: Hybrid block combining Mamba SSM recurrence with SWA-1024 local attention
Untied embeddings plus high weight decay to stabilize int8 under 16MB
Score-first TTT (25 epochs, no freeze) after 600s training
